title: uragoga pavetta
side_effects: Uragoga pavetta can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, stomach cramps, and nausea, which may be caused by its high concentration of tannins and other compounds. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to kidney damage and an imbalance of electrolytes in the body. In some cases, uragoga pavetta has been associated with allergic reactions, including hives and itching, particularly in individuals with sensitive skin or allergies. If not used under medical supervision, uragoga pavetta may exacerbate pre-existing conditions, such as high blood pressure or kidney disease.
